name: Arcanist's Magic Aura
description: With a touch, you place an illusion on a willing creature or an object that isn't being worn or carried. A creature gains the Mask effect (spells and magical effects treat it as a chosen creature type), and an object gains the False Aura effect (Detect Magic and similar reveal a chosen school or no magic at all). Cast on the same target every day for 30 days and the illusion lasts until dispelled.
